let shippingChartInstance = null; // Daily PLA activity detected by Taiwan MND (last 7 days) // Embedded by fetch_taiwan_shipping.py from mnd.gov.tw const PLA_DAILY_ACTIVITY = [ {date:'2026-04-16',aircraft:3,ships:6,official:3,crossed:0}, {date:'2026-04-17',aircraft:5,ships:5,official:1,crossed:0}, {date:'2026-04-18',aircraft:5,ships:6,official:1,crossed:0}, {date:'2026-04-19',aircraft:2,ships:6,official:1,crossed:0}, {date:'2026-04-20',aircraft:5,ships:11,official:1,crossed:0}, {date:'2026-04-21',aircraft:24,ships:7,official:1,crossed:11}, {date:'2026-04-22',aircraft:6,ships:5,official:1,crossed:0} ]; // Taiwan invasion news articles (embedded by fetch_taiwan_shipping.py) const TAIWAN_NEWS_DATA = [ {date:'2026-04-22',title:'Coast Guard, ocean agency rescue stranded green sea turtle in Penghu',url:'https://focustaiwan.tw/society/202604220015',source:'Focus Taiwan'}, {date:'2026-04-20',title:'China\'s Liaoning aircraft carrier passes through Taiwan Strait: MND',url:'https://focustaiwan.tw/cross-strait/202604200019',source:'Focus Taiwan'}, {date:'2026-04-18',title:'Japan warship in Taiwan Strait signals free passage rights: Academic',url:'https://focustaiwan.tw/politics/202604180011',source:'Focus Taiwan'}, {date:'2026-04-18',title:'Japanese warship transits Strait',url:'https://www.taipeitimes.com/News/taiwan/archives/2026/04/18/2003855820',source:'Taipei Times'}, {date:'2026-04-16',title:'Taiwan confirms China has asked for more cross-strait flights',url:'https://focustaiwan.tw/cross-strait/202604160018',source:'Focus Taiwan'} ]; // China military exercises near Taiwan (2022-2026) const CHINA_MILITARY_EXERCISES = [ { name: 'PLA Exercises (Pelosi Visit)', date: '2022-08-04', end_date: '2022-08-07', ships: 13, aircraft: 68, rockets: 11, coast_guard: 0, trigger: 'U.S. House Speaker Nancy Pelosi visited Taiwan', notes: 'First large-scale exercises since 1996. 6 exclusion zones around Taiwan. 11 ballistic missiles fired (5 landed in Japan EEZ).' }, { name: 'Joint Sword-2023', date: '2023-04-08', end_date: '2023-04-10', ships: 12, aircraft: 91, rockets: 0, coast_guard: 0, trigger: 'Taiwan President Tsai met U.S. House Speaker McCarthy in California', notes: '3-day "combat readiness patrols" encircling Taiwan. Simulated precision strikes.' }, { name: 'Joint Sword-2024A', date: '2024-05-23', end_date: '2024-05-24', ships: 14, aircraft: 62, rockets: 0, coast_guard: 8, trigger: 'Inauguration of President Lai Ching-te', notes: '2-day exercise. Joint precision strikes on critical targets. Simulated initial invasion phase.' }, { name: 'Joint Sword-2024B', date: '2024-10-14', end_date: '2024-10-15', ships: 15, aircraft: 153, rockets: 0, coast_guard: 12, trigger: 'President Lai National Day speech asserting sovereignty', notes: 'Largest air sorties to date (153 in one day). Port quarantine drills. Half of Taiwan\'s fleet equivalent deployed.' }, { name: 'Strait Thunder-2025A', date: '2025-04-01', end_date: '2025-04-03', ships: 20, aircraft: 76, rockets: 0, coast_guard: 10, trigger: 'U.S. arms sales to Taiwan', notes: 'Shandong carrier strike group deployed east of Taiwan. 37 aircraft crossed median line. Live-fire missile drills in East China Sea.' }, { name: 'Justice Mission-2025', date: '2025-12-29', end_date: '2025-12-30', ships: 14, aircraft: 130, rockets: 27, coast_guard: 14, trigger: 'U.S. $2B+ arms package to Taiwan', notes: 'Largest exercises to date. 8 exclusion zones (5 overlapped territorial waters). 27 rockets fired (10 in contiguous zone). 4 amphibious assault ships. 941 flights disrupted. 90 aircraft crossed median line Day 1.' } ]; function renderTaiwanShippingTracker() { const container = document.getElementById('taiwan-shipping-tracker'); if (!container) return; if (container.dataset.rendered === 'true') return; const data = TAIWAN_SHIPPING_DATA; if (!data || !data.history || data.history.length === 0) { container.innerHTML = '
No shipping data available. Run fetch_taiwan_shipping.py to collect data.
'; return; } const latest = data.history[data.history.length - 1]; const totals = latest.totals; const ports = latest.ports; const strait = latest.strait; // Build today's totals let html = `

🚢 TAIWAN PORT TRAFFIC

${totals.vessels_in_port}
In Port
${totals.arrivals_24h}
Arrivals 24h
${totals.departures_24h}
Departures 24h
${totals.expected_arrivals}
Expected
`; // Taiwan Strait section if (strait) { html += `
${strait.total_vessels}
Taiwan Strait
${strait.moving}
In Transit
${strait.stationary}
Anchored
${strait.total_vessels + totals.vessels_in_port}
Total Region
`; } // Port breakdown html += '
'; const portNames = ['Kaohsiung', 'Keelung', 'Taichung', 'Taipei']; portNames.forEach(name => { const p = ports[name]; if (!p) return; const totalMovement = (p.arrivals_24h || 0) + (p.departures_24h || 0); html += `
${name} ${p.vessels_in_port} in port
Arrivals (24h)${p.arrivals_24h || 0}
Departures (24h)${p.departures_24h || 0}
Expected${p.expected_arrivals || 0}
Total Movement${totalMovement}
`; }); html += '
'; // Historical line chart - last 7 days of traffic html += `
`; html += `
Source: MyShipTracking.com AIS Data | Updated: ${data.generated_at || 'N/A'}
`; html += '
'; // Military Exercises section html += renderMilitaryExercises(); container.innerHTML = html; container.dataset.rendered = 'true'; // Render chart (last 7 days) const last7 = data.history.slice(-7); renderShippingChart(last7); // Render PLA activity chart after DOM update setTimeout(() => renderPlaChart(PLA_DAILY_ACTIVITY), 100); } function renderPlaChart(data) { const canvas = document.getElementById('plaChart'); if (!canvas || !data || data.length === 0) return; const labels = data.map(d => { const dt = new Date(d.date + 'T00:00:00'); return (dt.getMonth()+1) + '/' + dt.getDate(); }); new Chart(canvas, { type: 'line', data: { labels: labels, datasets: [ { label: 'Aircraft', data: data.map(d => d.aircraft), borderColor: 'rgba(0, 255, 0, 0.9)', backgroundColor: 'rgba(0, 255, 0, 0.05)', borderWidth: 1.5, pointRadius: 2, pointBackgroundColor: 'rgba(0, 255, 0, 0.9)', tension: 0.2, fill: true }, { label: 'Ships', data: data.map(d => d.ships), borderColor: 'rgba(0, 150, 255, 0.8)', borderWidth: 1.5, pointRadius: 2, pointBackgroundColor: 'rgba(0, 150, 255, 0.8)', tension: 0.2, fill: false }, { label: 'Crossed Median', data: data.map(d => d.crossed), borderColor: 'rgba(255, 200, 0, 0.8)', borderWidth: 1.5, borderDash: [4, 2], pointRadius: 2, pointBackgroundColor: 'rgba(255, 200, 0, 0.8)', tension: 0.2, fill: false } ] }, options: { responsive: true, maintainAspectRatio: false, interaction: { mode: 'index', intersect: false }, plugins: { legend: { labels: { color: 'rgba(0,255,0,0.7)', font: { size: 10 }, usePointStyle: true } }, title: { display: true, text: 'Chinese Military Daily Activity Near Taiwan (2026)', color: 'rgba(0,255,0,0.7)', font: { size: 12 } } }, scales: { x: { ticks: { color: 'rgba(0,255,0,0.4)', font: { size: 8 }, maxRotation: 45 }, grid: { color: 'rgba(0,255,0,0.06)' } }, y: { beginAtZero: true, ticks: { color: 'rgba(0,255,0,0.5)', font: { size: 9 } }, grid: { color: 'rgba(0,255,0,0.08)' } } } } }); } function renderMilitaryExercises() { const exercises = CHINA_MILITARY_EXERCISES; const daily = PLA_DAILY_ACTIVITY; let html = `

⊕ CHINESE MILITARY ACTIVITY NEAR TAIWAN

`; // Daily activity table + chart if (daily && daily.length > 0) { const last7 = daily.slice(-7); const totalAC = daily.reduce((s,d) => s + d.aircraft, 0); const totalShips = daily.reduce((s,d) => s + d.ships, 0); const totalCrossed = daily.reduce((s,d) => s + d.crossed, 0); const avgAC = (totalAC / daily.length).toFixed(0); // Detect flight pauses (2+ consecutive days with 0 aircraft) let pauses = []; let pStart = null; for (let i = 0; i < daily.length; i++) { if (daily[i].aircraft === 0) { if (pStart === null) pStart = i; } else { if (pStart !== null && (i - pStart) >= 2) { pauses.push({start: daily[pStart].date, end: daily[i-1].date, days: i - pStart}); } pStart = null; } } if (pStart !== null && (daily.length - pStart) >= 2) { pauses.push({start: daily[pStart].date, end: daily[daily.length-1].date, days: daily.length - pStart}); } html += `
Daily PLA Detections - 2026 (Taiwan MND)
${totalAC}
${daily.length}-Day Aircraft
${totalShips}
${daily.length}-Day Ships
${totalCrossed}
Crossed Median
${avgAC}
Avg Aircraft/Day
`; // Flight pauses if (pauses.length > 0) { html += '
'; pauses.forEach(p => { const s = new Date(p.start+'T00:00:00'); const e = new Date(p.end+'T00:00:00'); const sLabel = (s.getMonth()+1)+'/'+s.getDate(); const eLabel = (e.getMonth()+1)+'/'+e.getDate(); html += `
⏸ Flight Pause: ${sLabel} - ${eLabel} (${p.days} days, 0 aircraft detected)
`; }); html += '
'; } // 2026 line chart html += '
'; // Last 7 days table html += ``; last7.slice().reverse().forEach(d => { const dt = new Date(d.date + 'T00:00:00'); const label = (dt.getMonth()+1) + '/' + dt.getDate(); html += ``; }); html += `
DateAircraftShipsCoast GuardCrossed Median
${label} ${d.aircraft} ${d.ships} ${d.official || '-'} ${d.crossed || '-'}
Source: Taiwan Ministry of National Defense (mnd.gov.tw) | ${daily.length} days tracked
`; } // Named exercises section if (!exercises || exercises.length === 0) { html += '
'; return html; } html += `
Named Exercises - 2022-2026 (Taiwan MND, Global Taiwan Institute)
`; exercises.slice().reverse().forEach((ex, i) => { const startDate = new Date(ex.date + 'T00:00:00'); const endDate = new Date(ex.end_date + 'T00:00:00'); const startStr = (startDate.getMonth()+1) + '/' + startDate.getDate() + '/' + startDate.getFullYear(); const endStr = (endDate.getMonth()+1) + '/' + endDate.getDate() + '/' + endDate.getFullYear(); // Days since exercise const now = new Date(); const daysSince = Math.floor((now - endDate) / (1000*60*60*24)); const daysAgoStr = daysSince < 30 ? daysSince + 'd ago' : daysSince < 365 ? Math.floor(daysSince/30) + 'mo ago' : (daysSince/365).toFixed(1) + 'yr ago'; html += `
${ex.name} ${startStr} - ${endStr}
${ex.ships} Warships
${ex.aircraft} Aircraft
${ex.rockets || '-'} Rockets
${ex.coast_guard || '-'} Coast Guard
${daysAgoStr} Since
Trigger: ${ex.trigger}
${ex.notes}
`; }); html += '
'; // News section html += renderTaiwanNews(); return html; } function renderTaiwanNews() { const news = TAIWAN_NEWS_DATA; if (!news || news.length === 0) return ''; // Group by date const byDate = {}; news.forEach(a => { if (!byDate[a.date]) byDate[a.date] = []; byDate[a.date].push(a); }); const dates = Object.keys(byDate).sort().reverse(); let html = `

📰 TAIWAN-CHINA THREAT MONITOR

${news.length} articles from Focus Taiwan & Taipei Times
`; // Show article count per day for rolling 8 days (4x2 grid) const today = new Date(); for (let i = 0; i < 8; i++) { const d = new Date(today); d.setDate(d.getDate() - i); // Use local date (not UTC) to match article dates const key = d.getFullYear() + '-' + String(d.getMonth()+1).padStart(2,'0') + '-' + String(d.getDate()).padStart(2,'0'); const label = (d.getMonth()+1) + '/' + d.getDate(); const count = byDate[key] ? byDate[key].length : 0; html += `
${count}
${label}
`; } html += '
'; // Article list grouped by date dates.forEach(d => { const dt = new Date(d + 'T00:00:00'); const dateLabel = dt.toLocaleDateString('en-US', {month:'short', day:'numeric', year:'numeric'}); html += `
${dateLabel} (${byDate[d].length} articles)
`; byDate[d].forEach(a => { const srcColor = a.source === 'Focus Taiwan' ? 'rgba(0,200,255,0.6)' : 'rgba(200,200,0,0.6)'; html += `
${a.title} ${a.source}
`; }); html += '
'; }); html += `
Sources: Focus Taiwan (CNA), Taipei Times | Updated daily
`; html += '
'; return html; } function renderShippingChart(history) { const canvas = document.getElementById('shippingChart'); if (!canvas) return; if (shippingChartInstance) { shippingChartInstance.destroy(); } const labels = history.map(h => { const d = new Date(h.trade_date + 'T00:00:00'); return (d.getMonth() + 1) + '/' + d.getDate(); }); const arrivals = history.map(h => h.totals.arrivals_24h || 0); const departures = history.map(h => h.totals.departures_24h || 0); const inPort = history.map(h => h.totals.vessels_in_port || 0); const straitTotal = history.map(h => h.strait ? h.strait.total_vessels : 0); shippingChartInstance = new Chart(canvas, { type: 'line', data: { labels: labels, datasets: [ { label: 'Arrivals', data: arrivals, borderColor: 'rgba(0, 255, 0, 0.9)', backgroundColor: 'rgba(0, 255, 0, 0.1)', borderWidth: 2, pointRadius: 4, pointBackgroundColor: 'rgba(0, 255, 0, 0.9)', tension: 0.3, fill: false }, { label: 'Departures', data: departures, borderColor: 'rgba(255, 150, 0, 0.9)', backgroundColor: 'rgba(255, 150, 0, 0.1)', borderWidth: 2, pointRadius: 4, pointBackgroundColor: 'rgba(255, 150, 0, 0.9)', tension: 0.3, fill: false }, { label: 'In Port', data: inPort, borderColor: 'rgba(0, 150, 255, 0.8)', backgroundColor: 'rgba(0, 150, 255, 0.1)', borderWidth: 2, pointRadius: 4, pointBackgroundColor: 'rgba(0, 150, 255, 0.8)', tension: 0.3, fill: false, yAxisID: 'y1' }, { label: 'Strait Traffic', data: straitTotal, borderColor: 'rgba(255, 255, 0, 0.8)', backgroundColor: 'rgba(255, 255, 0, 0.1)', borderWidth: 2, borderDash: [5, 3], pointRadius: 4, pointBackgroundColor: 'rgba(255, 255, 0, 0.8)', pointStyle: 'triangle', tension: 0.3, fill: false } ] }, options: { responsive: true, maintainAspectRatio: false, interaction: { mode: 'index', intersect: false }, plugins: { legend: { labels: { color: 'rgba(0,255,0,0.7)', font: { size: 10 }, usePointStyle: true, pointStyle: 'circle' } }, title: { display: true, text: '7-Day Vessel Traffic (All Taiwan Ports)', color: 'rgba(0,255,0,0.7)', font: { size: 12 } } }, scales: { x: { ticks: { color: 'rgba(0,255,0,0.5)', font: { size: 9 } }, grid: { color: 'rgba(0,255,0,0.08)' } }, y: { position: 'left', title: { display: true, text: 'Arrivals / Departures', color: 'rgba(0,255,0,0.5)', font: { size: 9 } }, ticks: { color: 'rgba(0,255,0,0.5)', font: { size: 9 } }, grid: { color: 'rgba(0,255,0,0.08)' }, beginAtZero: true }, y1: { position: 'right', title: { display: true, text: 'Vessels In Port', color: 'rgba(0,150,255,0.5)', font: { size: 9 } }, ticks: { color: 'rgba(0,150,255,0.5)', font: { size: 9 } }, grid: { drawOnChartArea: false }, beginAtZero: true } } } }); } // ========== EMBEDDED_COORDINATES FOR VIDEO GENERATION ========== // This object provides exact pixel positions for video highlight generation // Used by Youtube/create_format_test_video.py to draw boxes, circles, and cursor const EMBEDDED_COORDINATES = { // Current format (set by setFormat() or URL parameter) format: 'DESKTOP', // Format-specific resolutions resolutions: { DESKTOP: { width: 3840, height: 2160 }, // 16:9 landscape (4K) MOBILE: { width: 1080, height: 1920 } // 9:16 portrait (shorts) }, // Grid overlay for alignment verification grid: { major: 100, minor: 50 }, // DESKTOP layout coordinates (3840x2160) DESKTOP: { static: { header: { x: 0, y: 0, w: 3840, h: 200 }, title: { x: 1520, y: 50, w: 800, h: 100, center: [1920, 100] }, summaryBar: { x: 200, y: 220, w: 3440, h: 120 }, tabBar: { x: 400, y: 360, w: 3040, h: 60 }, footer: { x: 0, y: 2060, w: 3840, h: 100 } }, summary: { total: { x: 400, y: 240, w: 200, h: 80, center: [500, 280] }, unusual: { x: 700, y: 240, w: 200, h: 80, center: [800, 280] }, bullish: { x: 1000, y: 240, w: 200, h: 80, center: [1100, 280] }, neutral: { x: 1300, y: 240, w: 200, h: 80, center: [1400, 280] }, bearish: { x: 1600, y: 240, w: 200, h: 80, center: [1700, 280] } }, cardGrid: { startX: 200, startY: 450, cardWidth: 800, cardHeight: 400, gapX: 80, gapY: 40, columns: 4, rows: 4 }, cardElements: { ticker: { dx: 20, dy: 20, w: 150, h: 50 }, price: { dx: 20, dy: 80, w: 200, h: 40 }, priceChange: { dx: 220, dy: 80, w: 100, h: 40 }, optionVolume: { dx: 20, dy: 140, w: 350, h: 30 }, optionVolumeValue: { dx: 380, dy: 140, w: 150, h: 30 }, dollarVolume: { dx: 20, dy: 180, w: 350, h: 30 }, dollarVolumeValue: { dx: 380, dy: 180, w: 150, h: 30 }, putCallRatio: { dx: 20, dy: 220, w: 350, h: 30 }, putCallValue: { dx: 380, dy: 220, w: 100, h: 30 }, callPutBar: { dx: 20, dy: 270, w: 760, h: 30 }, badges: { dx: 20, dy: 320, w: 760, h: 60 } } }, // MOBILE layout coordinates (1080x1920) MOBILE: { static: { header: { x: 0, y: 0, w: 1080, h: 150 }, title: { x: 140, y: 40, w: 800, h: 70, center: [540, 75] }, summaryBar: { x: 30, y: 170, w: 1020, h: 200 }, tabBar: { x: 30, y: 390, w: 1020, h: 50 }, footer: { x: 0, y: 1750, w: 1080, h: 170 } }, summary: { total: { x: 60, y: 190, w: 180, h: 70, center: [150, 225] }, unusual: { x: 260, y: 190, w: 180, h: 70, center: [350, 225] }, bullish: { x: 460, y: 190, w: 180, h: 70, center: [550, 225] }, neutral: { x: 660, y: 190, w: 180, h: 70, center: [750, 225] }, bearish: { x: 860, y: 190, w: 180, h: 70, center: [950, 225] } }, cardGrid: { startX: 30, startY: 460, cardWidth: 480, cardHeight: 350, gapX: 30, gapY: 30, columns: 2, rows: 3 }, cardElements: { ticker: { dx: 15, dy: 15, w: 120, h: 40 }, price: { dx: 15, dy: 60, w: 160, h: 30 }, priceChange: { dx: 180, dy: 60, w: 80, h: 30 }, optionVolume: { dx: 15, dy: 100, w: 280, h: 25 }, optionVolumeValue: { dx: 300, dy: 100, w: 120, h: 25 }, dollarVolume: { dx: 15, dy: 130, w: 280, h: 25 }, dollarVolumeValue: { dx: 300, dy: 130, w: 120, h: 25 }, putCallRatio: { dx: 15, dy: 160, w: 280, h: 25 }, putCallValue: { dx: 300, dy: 160, w: 80, h: 25 }, callPutBar: { dx: 15, dy: 200, w: 450, h: 25 }, badges: { dx: 15, dy: 240, w: 450, h: 50 } } } }; // Helper function to get current format's resolution function getResolution() { return EMBEDDED_COORDINATES.resolutions[EMBEDDED_COORDINATES.format]; } // Helper function to get card position by index (for current format) function getCardPosition(index) { const layout = EMBEDDED_COORDINATES[EMBEDDED_COORDINATES.format]; const grid = layout.cardGrid; const col = index % grid.columns; const row = Math.floor(index / grid.columns); return { x: grid.startX + col * (grid.cardWidth + grid.gapX), y: grid.startY + row * (grid.cardHeight + grid.gapY), w: grid.cardWidth, h: grid.cardHeight, center: [ grid.startX + col * (grid.cardWidth + grid.gapX) + grid.cardWidth / 2, grid.startY + row * (grid.cardHeight + grid.gapY) + grid.cardHeight / 2 ] }; } // Helper function to get element position within a card function getElementPosition(cardIndex, elementName) { const card = getCardPosition(cardIndex); const layout = EMBEDDED_COORDINATES[EMBEDDED_COORDINATES.format]; const elem = layout.cardElements[elementName]; if (!elem) return null; return { x: card.x + elem.dx, y: card.y + elem.dy, w: elem.w, h: elem.h, center: [card.x + elem.dx + elem.w / 2, card.y + elem.dy + elem.h / 2] }; } // Export all coordinates for video generation (called by Playwright) function exportCoordinates() { const layout = EMBEDDED_COORDINATES[EMBEDDED_COORDINATES.format]; const coords = { format: EMBEDDED_COORDINATES.format, resolution: getResolution(), generated: new Date().toISOString(), static: layout.static, summary: layout.summary, cardGrid: layout.cardGrid, cards: [] }; // Export all visible cards with their element positions const cards = document.querySelectorAll('.activity-card'); cards.forEach((card, index) => { const tickerEl = card.querySelector('h3'); const ticker = tickerEl ? tickerEl.textContent.trim() : 'UNKNOWN'; coords.cards.push({ index: index, ticker: ticker, box: getCardPosition(index), elements: { ticker: getElementPosition(index, 'ticker'), price: getElementPosition(index, 'price'), optionVolume: getElementPosition(index, 'optionVolumeValue'), dollarVolume: getElementPosition(index, 'dollarVolumeValue'), putCall: getElementPosition(index, 'putCallValue') } }); }); return coords; } // Set format mode (called by toggle buttons or URL parameter) function setFormat(format) { if (format !== 'DESKTOP' && format !== 'MOBILE') { console.warn('Invalid format:', format); return; } EMBEDDED_COORDINATES.format = format; // Toggle body classes for CSS styling if (format === 'MOBILE') { document.body.classList.add('mobile-mode'); document.body.classList.remove('desktop-mode'); } else { document.body.classList.add('desktop-mode'); document.body.classList.remove('mobile-mode'); } // Update button states const desktopBtn = document.getElementById('btn-desktop'); const mobileBtn = document.getElementById('btn-mobile'); if (desktopBtn) desktopBtn.classList.toggle('active', format === 'DESKTOP'); if (mobileBtn) mobileBtn.classList.toggle('active', format === 'MOBILE'); console.log('Format set to:', format, '- Resolution:', getResolution()); } // Toggle YouTube Safe Zones overlay (for recording mode) function toggleSafeZones(show) { if (show) { document.body.classList.add('show-safe-zones'); console.log('Safe zones overlay: ON - Showing YouTube UI danger areas'); } else { document.body.classList.remove('show-safe-zones'); console.log('Safe zones overlay: OFF'); } } // Check URL parameter for format on page load function initFormatFromURL() { // 1. Check URL parameter first (manual override) const urlParams = new URLSearchParams(window.location.search); const urlFormat = urlParams.get('format'); if (urlFormat === 'MOBILE' || urlFormat === 'DESKTOP') { setFormat(urlFormat); return; } // 2. Auto-detect based on screen width // Mobile: < 768px width OR portrait orientation on tablets const isMobile = window.innerWidth < 768 || (window.innerWidth < 1024 && window.innerHeight > window.innerWidth); if (isMobile) { setFormat('MOBILE'); console.log('Auto-detected: MOBILE (screen width: ' + window.innerWidth + 'px)'); } else { setFormat('DESKTOP'); console.log('Auto-detected: DESKTOP (screen width: ' + window.innerWidth + 'px)'); } } // Re-detect on window resize (optional - for testing in browser dev tools) window.addEventListener('resize', function() { // Only auto-switch if no URL parameter is set const urlParams = new URLSearchParams(window.location.search); if (!urlParams.get('format')) { const isMobile = window.innerWidth < 768 || (window.innerWidth < 1024 && window.innerHeight > window.innerWidth); const currentMode = document.body.classList.contains('mobile-mode') ? 'MOBILE' : 'DESKTOP'; const newMode = isMobile ? 'MOBILE' : 'DESKTOP'; if (currentMode !== newMode) { setFormat(newMode); console.log('Resize detected: switching to ' + newMode); } } }) async function loadData() { // Data is embedded directly - no fetch needed if (typeof ACTIVITY_DATA !== 'undefined') { activityData = ACTIVITY_DATA; renderAllTabs(); } else { showErrorState(); } } function showErrorState() { const errorHtml = `
⚠
No data available
Run: python fetch_unusual_activity.py
`; const tabContent = document.getElementById('tabContent'); if (tabContent) { tabContent.innerHTML = errorHtml; } } function formatGroupName(groupName) { // Handle special cases first const specialNames = { 'index_usa': 'Index (USA)', 'index_global': 'Index (Global)', 'index_sector': 'Index (Sector)', 'index_volatility': 'Index (VIX)', 'real_estate': 'Real Estate', 'gold_silver': 'Gold & Silver' }; if (specialNames[groupName]) return specialNames[groupName]; // Convert group_name to display format (e.g., "oil" -> "Oil") return groupName.replace(/_/g, ' ').replace(/\b\w/g, c => c.toUpperCase()); } // Sector icons mapping for 3D carousel // Some icons use HTML for custom styling (btc-coin, china-char) const SECTOR_ICONS = { 'index_usa': '', 'index_global': '🌍', 'index_sector': '📊', 'index_volatility': '📈', 'banks': '🏦', 'crypto': '₿', 'gold_silver': '🥇', 'minerals': '💎', 'china': '華', 'defense': '🛡️', 'oil': '🛢️', 'tariff': '📦', 'tech': '💻', 'energy': '⚡', 'healthcare': '💊', 'consumer': '🛒', 'industrial': '🏭', 'real_estate': '🏠', 'home_builders': '🛠️', 'space': '🚀', 'weed': '', 'solar': '', 'shipping': '🚢', 'taiwan': '', 'airlines': '✈️', 'all': '📊' }; // Current carousel index (for tracking position) let carouselCurrentIndex = 0; let carouselGroups = []; // Get position class based on offset from center function getCarouselPositionClass(offset, total) { const normalized = ((offset % total) + total) % total; if (normalized === 0) return 'center'; if (normalized === 1) return 'right'; if (normalized === total - 1) return 'left'; if (normalized === 2) return 'far-right'; if (normalized === total - 2) return 'far-left'; return 'hidden'; } // Render the 3D sector carousel function renderSectorCarousel(groups) { carouselGroups = groups; const carousel = document.getElementById('carousel3d'); if (!carousel) return; let html = ''; groups.forEach((group, index) => { const displayName = formatGroupName(group); const icon = SECTOR_ICONS[group] || '📁'; const posClass = getCarouselPositionClass(index - carouselCurrentIndex, groups.length); html += `
${icon}
${displayName}
`; }); carousel.innerHTML = html; } // Update carousel positions function updateCarouselPositions() { const items = document.querySelectorAll('.sector-item'); items.forEach((item, index) => { const offset = index - carouselCurrentIndex; const posClass = getCarouselPositionClass(offset, carouselGroups.length); item.className = 'sector-item ' + posClass; }); } // Select a sector from the carousel function selectCarouselSector(index) { if (index === carouselCurrentIndex) { // Already selected (center) - show the sector chart popup const group = carouselGroups[index]; const tabId = group.replace(/_/g, '-'); showChart(tabId, 'tickers'); return; } carouselCurrentIndex = index; updateCarouselPositions(); // Switch to the corresponding tab const group = carouselGroups[index]; const tabId = group.replace(/_/g, '-'); switchTab(tabId); } // Sync carousel with tab selection (for backwards compatibility) function syncCarouselWithTab(tabId) { const group = tabId.replace(/-/g, '_'); const index = carouselGroups.indexOf(group); if (index !== -1 && index !== carouselCurrentIndex) { carouselCurrentIndex = index; updateCarouselPositions(); } } function formatTradeDate(dateStr) { // Format: "Monday, January 6, 2026" for DAILY data const date = new Date(dateStr + 'T12:00:00'); // Add time to avoid timezone issues const options = { weekday: 'long', year: 'numeric', month: 'long', day: 'numeric' }; return date.toLocaleDateString('en-US', options); } function renderAllTabs() { if (!activityData) return; // Trade date is already set in static HTML - no need to overwrite const now = new Date(); const timeStr = now.toLocaleDateString('en-US', { month: 'short', day: 'numeric', year: 'numeric' }) + ' ' + now.toLocaleTimeString('en-US', { hour: '2-digit', minute: '2-digit' }); // Get groups from data (or fall back to hardcoded if not present) const groups = activityData.groups || ['banks', 'gold_silver']; // Generate tabs const tabContainer = document.getElementById('tabContainer'); let tabsHtml = ''; groups.forEach((group, index) => { const tabId = group.replace(/_/g, '-'); const displayName = formatGroupName(group); const activeClass = index === 0 ? ' active' : ''; tabsHtml += ``; }); tabContainer.innerHTML = tabsHtml; // Add click handlers to new tabs document.querySelectorAll('.tab-btn').forEach(btn => { btn.addEventListener('click', () => switchTab(btn.dataset.tab)); }); // Generate 3D Carousel renderSectorCarousel(groups); // Generate tab panels const tabContent = document.getElementById('tabContent'); let panelsHtml = ''; groups.forEach((group, index) => { const tabId = group.replace(/_/g, '-'); const activeClass = index === 0 ? ' active' : ''; panelsHtml += `
-
Tickers
-
Unusual
-
Normal
-
Bullish
-
Neu/Mix
-
Bearish
${group === 'taiwan' ? '
' : ''}
Last updated: ${timeStr}
`; }); // Add "All" panel panelsHtml += `
-
Tickers
-
Unusual
-
Normal
-
Bullish
-
Neu/Mix
-
Bearish
Last updated: ${timeStr}
`; tabContent.innerHTML = panelsHtml; // Set first tab as current currentTab = groups[0].replace(/_/g, '-'); // Render data for each group groups.forEach(group => { const tabId = group.replace(/_/g, '-'); const data = activityData[group] || []; renderTab(tabId, data, group); }); // Update group options in modal updateGroupOptions(groups); // Initialize Options Analysis section updateOptionsAnalysis(); // Signal that tabs are fully rendered (for mobile tab restoration) document.dispatchEvent(new CustomEvent('tabsRendered')); } function updateGroupOptions(groups) { const container = document.getElementById('groupRadioOptions'); if (!container) return; let optionsHtml = ''; groups.forEach((group, index) => { const displayName = formatGroupName(group); const selectedClass = index === 0 ? ' selected' : ''; optionsHtml += ` `; }); container.innerHTML = optionsHtml; // Update selected group to first group if (groups.length > 0) { selectedGroup = groups[0]; } } // Calculate sentiment using same weighted scoring as renderCard function getSentiment(item) { if (!item || item.option_volume <= 0) return 'NEUTRAL'; let bullishScore = 0; let bearishScore = 0; // Dollar volume signal (60%+ threshold) - worth 2 points if (item.dv_call_pct >= 60) bullishScore += 2; else if (item.dv_put_pct >= 60) bearishScore += 2; // Option volume signal (60%+ threshold) - worth 1 point if (item.vol_call_pct >= 60) bullishScore += 1; else if (item.vol_put_pct >= 60) bearishScore += 1; // P/C ratio signal - worth 1 point if (item.put_call_volume_ratio < 0.7) bullishScore += 1; else if (item.put_call_volume_ratio > 1.0) bearishScore += 1; if (bullishScore > bearishScore) return 'BULLISH'; if (bearishScore > bullishScore) return 'BEARISH'; if (bullishScore > 0 && bearishScore > 0) return 'MIXED'; return 'NEUTRAL'; } function renderTab(tabId, data, groupName = null) { const grid = document.getElementById(`${tabId}-grid`); if (!grid) return; // Update summary stats const total = data ? data.length : 0; const unusual = data ? data.filter(d => d.is_unusual).length : 0; const normal = total - unusual; // Normal = not unusual // Count sentiments using weighted scoring (same as renderCard) let bullish = 0, neutral = 0, bearish = 0; if (data) { data.forEach(d => { const sentiment = getSentiment(d); if (sentiment === 'BULLISH') bullish++; else if (sentiment === 'BEARISH') bearish++; else neutral++; // NEUTRAL and MIXED both count as neutral }); } const totalEl = document.getElementById(`${tabId}-total`); const unusualEl = document.getElementById(`${tabId}-unusual`); const normalEl = document.getElementById(`${tabId}-normal`); const bullishEl = document.getElementById(`${tabId}-bullish`); const neutralEl = document.getElementById(`${tabId}-neutral`); const bearishEl = document.getElementById(`${tabId}-bearish`); if (totalEl) totalEl.textContent = total; if (unusualEl) unusualEl.textContent = unusual; if (normalEl) normalEl.textContent = normal; if (bullishEl) bullishEl.textContent = bullish; if (neutralEl) neutralEl.textContent = neutral; if (bearishEl) bearishEl.textContent = bearish; if (!data || data.length === 0) { // Show add card even for empty groups const addCardHtml = tabId !== 'all' ? `
+
Add Ticker
` : ''; grid.innerHTML = `
📊
No tickers in this group
` + addCardHtml; return; } // Don't show add card on "all" tab since it combines all groups const addCardHtml = tabId !== 'all' ? `
+
Add Ticker
` : ''; // Use layout 6 (pill badges centered) for all cards grid.innerHTML = data.map(item => renderCard(item, 6)).join('') + addCardHtml; } function renderCard(item, layoutNum = 1) { const hasData = item.option_volume > 0; const cardClass = !hasData ? 'no-data' : (item.is_unusual ? 'unusual' : ''); const badgeClass = !hasData ? 'normal' : (item.is_unusual ? 'unusual' : 'normal'); const badgeText = !hasData ? 'NORMAL' : (item.is_unusual ? 'UNUSUAL' : 'NORMAL'); // Sentiment badge - uses weighted scoring (dollar volume = 2 pts, others = 1 pt) let sentimentClass = 'neutral'; let sentimentText = 'NEUTRAL'; if (hasData) { // Weighted scoring: Dollar Volume = 2 pts (actual money flow), others = 1 pt let bullishScore = 0; let bearishScore = 0; // Dollar volume signal (60%+ threshold) - worth 2 points if (item.dv_call_pct >= 60) bullishScore += 2; else if (item.dv_put_pct >= 60) bearishScore += 2; // Option volume signal (60%+ threshold) - worth 1 point if (item.vol_call_pct >= 60) bullishScore += 1; else if (item.vol_put_pct >= 60) bearishScore += 1; // P/C ratio signal - worth 1 point if (item.put_call_volume_ratio < 0.7) bullishScore += 1; else if (item.put_call_volume_ratio > 1.0) bearishScore += 1; // Determine sentiment based on weighted scores if (bullishScore > bearishScore) { sentimentClass = 'bullish'; sentimentText = 'BULLISH'; } else if (bearishScore > bullishScore) { sentimentClass = 'bearish'; sentimentText = 'BEARISH'; } else if (bullishScore > 0 && bearishScore > 0) { // Tie with both having signals = MIXED sentimentClass = 'mixed'; sentimentText = 'MIXED'; } } else { sentimentClass = 'neutral'; sentimentText = 'NEUTRAL'; } // NO OPTIONS badge for tickers without options data const noOptionsBadge = !hasData ? 'NO OPTIONS' : ''; const priceChangeClass = item.price_change_pct >= 0 ? 'positive' : 'negative'; const priceChangeSign = item.price_change_pct >= 0 ? '+' : ''; const volRatioClass = item.option_volume_ratio >= 2 ? 'high' : 'normal'; const dollarRatioClass = item.dollar_volume_option_ratio >= 2 ? 'high' : 'normal'; const infoTip = "OPTION VOLUME: Contracts traded. Shows retail activity (small money). More than 2x 7-day avg = unusual activity. More than 60% = bullish/bearish sentiment. DOLLAR VOLUME: Premium traded. Shows institutional activity (big money). More than 2x 7-day avg = unusual activity. More than 60% = bullish/bearish sentiment. PUT/CALL RATIO: Puts vs calls ratio. Below 0.7 = bullish, above 1.0 = bearish. Below 0.5 or above 2.0 = unusual activity."; return `
ℹ

${item.ticker}

${item.company_name ? `
${item.company_name}
` : ''}
$${item.price.toFixed(2)} ${priceChangeSign}${item.price_change_pct.toFixed(2)}%
${hasData ? `
Option Volume ${item.option_volume_ratio >= 2 ? (item.vol_put_pct >= 60 ? '▼' : (item.vol_call_pct >= 60 ? '▲' : '')) : ''}${formatNumber(item.option_volume)} (${item.option_volume_ratio}x)
Dollar Volume ${item.dollar_volume_option_ratio >= 2 ? (item.dv_put_pct >= 60 ? '▼' : (item.dv_call_pct >= 60 ? '▲' : '')) : ''}$${formatNumber(item.dollar_volume_option)} (${item.dollar_volume_option_ratio}x)
Put/Call Ratio ${item.put_call_volume_ratio < 0.7 ? '▲' : (item.put_call_volume_ratio > 1.0 ? '▼' : '')}${item.put_call_volume_ratio.toFixed(2)}
Opt Vol ${item.vol_call_pct || 50}%
${item.vol_put_pct || 50}%
$ Vol ${item.dv_call_pct || 50}%
${item.dv_put_pct || 50}%
P/C 0
2
` : `
No options data available
`} ${hasData ? `
${generateBottomSection(item, layoutNum, badgeClass, badgeText, sentimentClass, sentimentText, '')}
${generateInsights(item)}
` : `
${noOptionsBadge}
`}
`; } function formatNumber(num) { if (num >= 1e9) return (num / 1e9).toFixed(1) + 'B'; if (num >= 1e6) return (num / 1e6).toFixed(1) + 'M'; if (num >= 1e3) return (num / 1e3).toFixed(1) + 'K'; return num.toString(); } const fmtNum = formatNumber; function generateBottomSection(item, layoutNum, badgeClass, badgeText, sentimentClass, sentimentText, noOptionsBadge = '') { const ticker = item.ticker; const activityBadge = `${badgeText}`; const sentimentBadge = `${sentimentText}`; switch(layoutNum) { case 1: // Two badges left and right return `
${activityBadge}${sentimentBadge}${noOptionsBadge} #1 ${ticker}
`; case 2: // Vertical stack centered return `
${activityBadge}${sentimentBadge}${noOptionsBadge} #2 ${ticker}
`; case 3: // Badges centered with gap return `
${activityBadge}${sentimentBadge}${noOptionsBadge}
#3 ${ticker}
`; case 4: // Badges stacked right aligned return `
${activityBadge}${sentimentBadge}${noOptionsBadge}
#4 ${ticker}
`; case 5: // Large activity badge, small sentiment return `
${badgeText}
${sentimentBadge}${noOptionsBadge}
#5 ${ticker}
`; case 6: // Pill/rounded badges centered return `
${activityBadge}${sentimentBadge}${noOptionsBadge}
`; case 7: // Compact badges centered return `
${activityBadge}${sentimentBadge}${noOptionsBadge} #7 ${ticker}
`; case 8: // Full width stacked badges return `
${activityBadge}${sentimentBadge}${noOptionsBadge} #8 ${ticker}
`; case 9: // Badges side by side centered with large gap return `
${activityBadge}${sentimentBadge}${noOptionsBadge}
#9 ${ticker}
`; case 10: // Badges spread with space between return `
${activityBadge}${sentimentBadge}${noOptionsBadge}
#10 ${ticker}
`; case 11: // Tab style connected badges return `
${activityBadge}${sentimentBadge}${noOptionsBadge} #11 ${ticker}
`; case 12: // Circular badges return `
${activityBadge}${sentimentBadge}${noOptionsBadge} #12 ${ticker}
`; case 13: // Outline badges (transparent background) return `
${activityBadge}${sentimentBadge}${noOptionsBadge} #13 ${ticker}
`; case 14: // Badges with glow effect return `
${activityBadge}${sentimentBadge}${noOptionsBadge} #14 ${ticker}
`; case 15: // Text only, no badge borders return `
${badgeText} ${sentimentText} #15 ${ticker}
`; case 16: // Icon + text badges const actIcon = badgeClass === 'unusual' ? '⚠' : '✓'; const sentIcon = sentimentClass === 'bullish' ? '↑' : (sentimentClass === 'bearish' ? '↓' : (sentimentClass === 'mixed' ? '↕' : '→')); return `
${actIcon} ${badgeText} ${sentIcon} ${sentimentText} #16 ${ticker}
`; case 17: // Small badges centered return `
${activityBadge}${sentimentBadge}
#17 ${ticker}
`; case 18: // Badges with subtle expand indicator return `
${activityBadge} ▼ ${sentimentBadge} #18 ${ticker}
`; case 19: // Full width badges side by side return `
${activityBadge}${sentimentBadge}
#19 ${ticker}
`; default: return `
${activityBadge}${sentimentBadge}
`; } } function generateInsights(item) { if (!item || item.option_volume <= 0) { return '

No options data available for analysis.

'; } let insights = []; // Activity insight (UNUSUAL vs NORMAL) if (item.is_unusual) { let reasons = []; if (item.option_volume_ratio >= 2) { reasons.push(`option volume is ${item.option_volume_ratio}x the 7-day average`); } if (item.dollar_volume_option_ratio >= 2) { reasons.push(`dollar volume is ${item.dollar_volume_option_ratio}x the 7-day average`); } if (item.put_call_volume_ratio < 0.5) { reasons.push(`P/C ratio of ${item.put_call_volume_ratio.toFixed(2)} is extremely bullish`); } else if (item.put_call_volume_ratio > 2.0) { reasons.push(`P/C ratio of ${item.put_call_volume_ratio.toFixed(2)} is extremely bearish`); } if (reasons.length > 0) { insights.push(`

UNUSUAL activity detected: ${reasons.join(', ')}.

`); } else { insights.push(`

UNUSUAL activity detected based on options flow patterns.

`); } } else { insights.push(`

NORMAL activity: Volume and flow metrics are within typical ranges.

`); } // Sentiment insight - weighted scoring (dollar volume = 2 pts, others = 1 pt) const pcRatio = item.put_call_volume_ratio; const volCallPct = item.vol_call_pct || 50; const volPutPct = item.vol_put_pct || 50; const dvCallPct = item.dv_call_pct || 50; const dvPutPct = item.dv_put_pct || 50; // Track signals and weighted scores let bullishSignals = []; let bearishSignals = []; let bullishScore = 0; let bearishScore = 0; // Dollar volume signal (60%+ threshold) - worth 2 points (actual money flow) if (dvCallPct >= 60) { bullishSignals.push(`dollar volume has ${dvCallPct}% calls`); bullishScore += 2; } else if (dvPutPct >= 60) { bearishSignals.push(`dollar volume has ${dvPutPct}% puts`); bearishScore += 2; } // Option volume signal (60%+ threshold) - worth 1 point if (volCallPct >= 60) { bullishSignals.push(`option volume has ${volCallPct}% calls`); bullishScore += 1; } else if (volPutPct >= 60) { bearishSignals.push(`option volume has ${volPutPct}% puts`); bearishScore += 1; } // P/C ratio signal - worth 1 point if (pcRatio < 0.7) { bullishSignals.push(`P/C ratio is ${pcRatio.toFixed(2)}`); bullishScore += 1; } else if (pcRatio > 1.0) { bearishSignals.push(`P/C ratio is ${pcRatio.toFixed(2)}`); bearishScore += 1; } // Determine overall sentiment based on weighted scores if (bullishScore > bearishScore) { insights.push(`

BULLISH sentiment: ${bullishSignals.join(', ')}.

`); } else if (bearishScore > bullishScore) { insights.push(`

BEARISH sentiment: ${bearishSignals.join(', ')}.

`); } else if (bullishScore > 0 && bearishScore > 0) { // Tie with both having signals = MIXED insights.push(`

MIXED sentiment: ${bullishSignals.join(', ')} (bullish) vs ${bearishSignals.join(', ')} (bearish).

`); } else { insights.push(`

NEUTRAL sentiment: Balanced flow with ${volCallPct}% calls, P/C ratio ${pcRatio.toFixed(2)}.

`); } return insights.join(''); } function toggleInsights(event, ticker) { event.stopPropagation(); const container = event.currentTarget; const content = container.nextElementSibling; container.classList.toggle('expanded'); content.classList.toggle('expanded'); } function collapseInsights(event) { event.stopPropagation(); const content = event.currentTarget; const container = content.previousElementSibling; container.classList.remove('expanded'); content.classList.remove('expanded'); } function toggleInsightsWrapper(event) { event.stopPropagation(); const wrapper = event.currentTarget; const content = wrapper.querySelector('.ai-insights-content'); // Collapse all other expanded cards first (accordion) document.querySelectorAll('.ai-insights-content.expanded').forEach(el => { if (el !== content) { el.classList.remove('expanded'); el.closest('.insights-wrapper').querySelector('.status-badge-container').classList.remove('expanded'); } }); wrapper.querySelector('.status-badge-container').classList.toggle('expanded'); content.classList.toggle('expanded'); } function navigateToTicker(ticker) { const isLatest = window.location.pathname.includes('_latest.html'); const prefix = isLatest ? '../../' : '../../../../'; window.location.href = `${prefix}tickers/${ticker}/${ticker}_latest.html`; } function showToast(message, isError = false) { const toast = document.getElementById('toast'); toast.textContent = message; toast.className = `toast ${isError ? 'error' : ''} active`; setTimeout(() => toast.classList.remove('active'), 3000); } // Add Ticker Modal Functions let selectedGroup = 'banks'; function openAddModal(group = 'banks') { selectedGroup = group; document.getElementById('addTickerModal').classList.add('active'); document.getElementById('tickerInput').value = ''; document.getElementById('commandOutput').classList.remove('visible'); // Update radio selection document.querySelectorAll('.radio-option').forEach(opt => opt.classList.remove('selected')); document.getElementById(`opt-${group}`).classList.add('selected'); // Focus input setTimeout(() => document.getElementById('tickerInput').focus(), 100); } function closeAddModal() { document.getElementById('addTickerModal').classList.remove('active'); } function selectGroup(group) { selectedGroup = group; document.querySelectorAll('.radio-option').forEach(opt => opt.classList.remove('selected')); // Handle new group option if (group === '__new__') { document.getElementById('opt-new_group').classList.add('selected'); document.getElementById('newGroupInput').style.display = 'block'; document.getElementById('newGroupName').focus(); } else { document.getElementById(`opt-${group}`).classList.add('selected'); document.getElementById('newGroupInput').style.display = 'none'; } } function generateAddCommand() { const ticker = document.getElementById('tickerInput').value.trim().toUpperCase(); if (!ticker) { showToast('Please enter a ticker symbol', true); return; } let groupName = selectedGroup; // Handle new group creation if (selectedGroup === '__new__') { groupName = document.getElementById('newGroupName').value.trim().toLowerCase().replace(/\s+/g, '_'); if (!groupName) { showToast('Please enter a group name', true); return; } // Validate group name if (!/^[a-z][a-z0-9_]*$/.test(groupName)) { showToast('Group name must start with a letter and contain only lowercase letters, numbers, and underscores', true); return; } } // Call server to add ticker (runs in background) closeAddModal(); showToast(`Adding ${ticker} to ${groupName}...`); fetch('http://localhost:8765', { method: 'POST', headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' }, body: JSON.stringify({ action: 'add_ticker', ticker: ticker, group: groupName }) }) .then(response => response.json()) .then(result => { if (result.status === 'success') { showToast(`Added ${ticker}! Refreshing...`); // Reload page after a short delay to show updated data setTimeout(() => window.location.reload(), 3000); } else { showToast(`Error: ${result.error || result.output}`, true); } }) .catch(err => { showToast('Server not running. Start prompt_server.py', true); }); } function copyCommand() { const cmd = document.getElementById('commandText').textContent; navigator.clipboard.writeText(cmd).then(() => { showToast('Command copied to clipboard!'); }).catch(() => { showToast('Failed to copy'); }); } // Remove Ticker Function function removeTicker(ticker, group) { if (!confirm(`Remove ${ticker} from watchlist?`)) return; showToast(`Removing ${ticker}...`); fetch('http://localhost:8765', { method: 'POST', headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' }, body: JSON.stringify({ action: 'remove_ticker', ticker: ticker }) }) .then(response => response.json()) .then(result => { if (result.status === 'success') { showToast(`Removed ${ticker}! Refreshing...`); setTimeout(() => window.location.reload(), 3000); } else { showToast(`Error: ${result.error || result.output}`, true); } }) .catch(err => { showToast('Server not running. Start prompt_server.py', true); }); } // Close modal on escape key document.addEventListener('keydown', (e) => { if (e.key === 'Escape') closeAddModal(); }); // Keyboard arrow navigation (desktop only) document.addEventListener('keydown', (e) => { // Skip if mobile mode or if user is typing in an input if (isMobileMode()) return; if (e.target.tagName === 'INPUT' || e.target.tagName === 'TEXTAREA') return; // Skip if chart modal is open if (document.querySelector('.chart-modal')) return; if (e.key === 'ArrowLeft') { const prevBtn = document.getElementById('staticPrevBtn'); if (prevBtn && prevBtn.href && prevBtn.href !== '#' && !prevBtn.href.includes('PREV_HREF')) { window.location.href = prevBtn.href; } } else if (e.key === 'ArrowRight') { const nextBtn = document.getElementById('staticNextBtn'); if (nextBtn && nextBtn.style.display !== 'none' && nextBtn.href && !nextBtn.href.includes('NEXT_HREF')) { window.location.href = nextBtn.href; } } }); // Close modal on overlay click document.getElementById('addTickerModal').addEventListener('click', (e) => { if (e.target.id === 'addTickerModal') closeAddModal(); }); // Matrix Rain Effect function initMatrixRain() { const canvas = document.getElementById('matrix-canvas'); const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d'); canvas.width = window.innerWidth; canvas.height = window.innerHeight; const chars = '01'; const fontSize = 14; const columns = canvas.width / fontSize; const drops = Array(Math.floor(columns)).fill(1); function draw() { ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.05)'; ctx.fillRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height); ctx.fillStyle = '#0f03'; ctx.font = fontSize + 'px monospace'; for (let i = 0; i < drops.length; i++) { const char = chars[Math.floor(Math.random() * chars.length)]; ctx.fillText(char, i * fontSize, drops[i] * fontSize); if (drops[i] * fontSize > canvas.height && Math.random() > 0.975) { drops[i] = 0; } drops[i]++; } } setInterval(draw, 50); window.addEventListener('resize', () => { canvas.width = window.innerWidth; canvas.height = window.innerHeight; }); } // ========== SMART NAVIGATION ========== // Screener navigation cycle: VIDEO → DATA → CHECKS → VIDEO const SCREENER_NAV_ORDER = ['VIDEO', 'DATA', 'CHECKS']; const SCREENER_NAME = 'unusual_activity'; function getScreenerPagePaths(screenerName, pageType, preferredTimeframe) { const tf = (preferredTimeframe || 'daily').toUpperCase(); const altTf = tf === 'DAILY' ? 'INTRADAY' : 'DAILY'; switch (pageType) { case 'VIDEO': return ['VIDEOS/index.html']; case 'DATA': return [ `${screenerName}_${tf}_latest.html`, `${screenerName}_${altTf}_latest.html` ]; case 'CHECKS': return [ `${screenerName}_${tf}_checks.html`, `${screenerName}_${altTf}_checks.html` ]; default: return []; } } async function screenerFileExists(url) { try { const response = await fetch(url, { method: 'HEAD' }); return response.ok; } catch (e) { return false; } } async function findNextScreenerPage(screenerName, currentType, timeframe) { const currentIndex = SCREENER_NAV_ORDER.indexOf(currentType); for (let i = 1; i <= SCREENER_NAV_ORDER.length; i++) { const nextIndex = (currentIndex + i) % SCREENER_NAV_ORDER.length; const nextType = SCREENER_NAV_ORDER[nextIndex]; const paths = getScreenerPagePaths(screenerName, nextType, timeframe); for (const path of paths) { if (await screenerFileExists(path)) { return { type: nextType, path: path }; } } } return null; } async function initScreenerSmartNav() { const btn = document.getElementById('smartNavBtn'); if (!btn) return; // Detect current timeframe from URL or default to DAILY const currentUrl = window.location.pathname; const timeframe = currentUrl.includes('INTRADAY') ? 'INTRADAY' : 'DAILY'; const next = await findNextScreenerPage(SCREENER_NAME, 'DATA', timeframe); if (next) { btn.textContent = next.type; btn.href = next.path; btn.onclick = () => { window.location.href = next.path; return false; }; } else { btn.style.display = 'none'; } } // Initialize smart navigation initScreenerSmartNav(); // ========== MOBILE ENHANCEMENTS ========== // These features only apply to mobile mode: // 1. Swipe left/right for prev/next navigation // 2. Preserve selected tab when navigating dates // 3. Preserve scroll position when navigating dates (function initMobileEnhancements() { // Check if mobile mode function isMobileMode() { return document.body.classList.contains('mobile-mode') || window.innerWidth < 768 || (window.innerWidth < 1024 && window.innerHeight > window.innerWidth); } // ===== TAB PERSISTENCE ===== const TAB_STORAGE_KEY = 'unusual_activity_selected_tab'; const SCROLL_STORAGE_KEY = 'unusual_activity_scroll_pos'; // Save current tab to localStorage function saveCurrentTab() { if (currentTab) { localStorage.setItem(TAB_STORAGE_KEY, currentTab); } } // Restore tab from localStorage (called after tabs are rendered) function restoreSavedTab() { const savedTab = localStorage.getItem(TAB_STORAGE_KEY); if (savedTab) { // Check if this tab exists on the current page const tabBtn = document.querySelector(`.tab-btn[data-tab="${savedTab}"]`); if (tabBtn) { switchTab(savedTab); } } } // ===== SCROLL POSITION PERSISTENCE ===== function saveScrollPosition() { sessionStorage.setItem(SCROLL_STORAGE_KEY, window.scrollY.toString()); } function restoreScrollPosition() { const savedScroll = sessionStorage.getItem(SCROLL_STORAGE_KEY); if (savedScroll) { // Small delay to ensure page is rendered setTimeout(() => { window.scrollTo(0, parseInt(savedScroll, 10)); sessionStorage.removeItem(SCROLL_STORAGE_KEY); }, 100); } } // ===== NAVIGATION HELPERS ===== function saveStateAndNavigate(url, saveScroll = true) { if (!url || url === '#' || url === 'NEXT_HREF') return; saveCurrentTab(); // Always save tab (both desktop and mobile) if (saveScroll && isMobileMode()) { saveScrollPosition(); // Only save scroll on mobile } window.location.href = url; } // Override nav arrow clicks to save tab state (both desktop and mobile) function enhanceNavArrows() { const prevBtn = document.getElementById('staticPrevBtn'); const nextBtn = document.getElementById('staticNextBtn'); if (prevBtn && prevBtn.href && prevBtn.href !== '#') { prevBtn.addEventListener('click', (e) => { e.preventDefault(); // Desktop: save tab only. Mobile: save tab + scroll saveStateAndNavigate(prevBtn.href, isMobileMode()); }); } if (nextBtn && nextBtn.href && nextBtn.href !== '#' && nextBtn.style.display !== 'none') { nextBtn.addEventListener('click', (e) => { e.preventDefault(); saveStateAndNavigate(nextBtn.href, isMobileMode()); }); } } // ===== CAROUSEL SWIPE SUPPORT (MOBILE) ===== // Only applies to the sector carousel - does not block other touch events function initCarouselSwipe() { const carousel = document.getElementById('sectorCarousel'); if (!carousel) return; let startX = 0; let startY = 0; let isDragging = false; let isHorizontalSwipe = false; carousel.addEventListener('touchstart', (e) => { isDragging = true; isHorizontalSwipe = false; startX = e.touches[0].clientX; startY = e.touches[0].clientY; }, { passive: true }); carousel.addEventListener('touchmove', (e) => { if (!isDragging) return; const deltaX = Math.abs(e.touches[0].clientX - startX); const deltaY = Math.abs(e.touches[0].clientY - startY); // If horizontal movement > vertical, it's a carousel swipe if (deltaX > deltaY && deltaX > 10) { isHorizontalSwipe = true; e.preventDefault(); // Prevent page scroll & browser back/forward } }, { passive: false }); carousel.addEventListener('touchend', (e) => { if (!isDragging) return; isDragging = false; if (!isHorizontalSwipe) return; const endX = e.changedTouches[0].clientX; const deltaX = endX - startX; // Swipe threshold of 50px if (Math.abs(deltaX) > 50) { const total = carouselGroups.length; if (total === 0) return; if (deltaX > 0) { // Swipe right = previous sector (wrap around) const newIndex = (carouselCurrentIndex - 1 + total) % total; selectCarouselSector(newIndex); } else { // Swipe left = next sector (wrap around) const newIndex = (carouselCurrentIndex + 1) % total; selectCarouselSector(newIndex); } } }, { passive: true }); } // ===== CALENDAR PICKER ENHANCEMENT ===== // Override the calendar date click to save state (both desktop and mobile) const originalNavigateToDate = window.navigateToDate; if (typeof originalNavigateToDate === 'function') { window.navigateToDate = function(dateStr) { saveCurrentTab(); // Always save tab (both desktop and mobile) if (isMobileMode()) { saveScrollPosition(); // Only save scroll on mobile } originalNavigateToDate(dateStr); }; } // ===== INITIALIZATION ===== // initSwipeListeners removed - now using initCarouselSwipe for carousel-only swipe // Wait for tabs to be rendered, then restore saved tab (both desktop and mobile) function waitForTabsAndRestore() { // Debug: track execution window._tabDebug = window._tabDebug || {}; window._tabDebug.listenerRegistered = true; // Listen for custom event dispatched after renderAllTabs completes document.addEventListener('tabsRendered', () => { window._tabDebug.eventFired = true; window._tabDebug.isMobileAtEvent = isMobileMode(); // Always restore tab (both desktop and mobile) window._tabDebug.restoreAttempted = true; restoreSavedTab(); // Only restore scroll on mobile if (isMobileMode()) { restoreScrollPosition(); } window._tabDebug.restoreCompleted = true; window._tabDebug.currentTabAfterRestore = currentTab; }, { once: true }); // Fallback: if event doesn't fire within 3 seconds, try polling setTimeout(() => { window._tabDebug.fallbackRan = true; const tabs = document.querySelectorAll('.tab-btn'); if (tabs.length > 0) { const savedTab = localStorage.getItem(TAB_STORAGE_KEY); window._tabDebug.fallbackSavedTab = savedTab; window._tabDebug.fallbackCurrentTab = currentTab; if (savedTab && currentTab !== savedTab) { window._tabDebug.fallbackRestoreAttempted = true; restoreSavedTab(); // Always restore tab if (isMobileMode()) { restoreScrollPosition(); // Only restore scroll on mobile } } } }, 3000); } // Also save tab when user manually switches tabs (both desktop and mobile) const originalSwitchTab = window.switchTab; if (typeof originalSwitchTab === 'function') { window.switchTab = function(tabId) { originalSwitchTab(tabId); saveCurrentTab(); // Always save tab selection }; } // Initialize initCarouselSwipe(); // Carousel swipe only - doesn't block date picker enhanceNavArrows(); waitForTabsAndRestore(); // Re-check mobile mode on resize window.addEventListener('resize', () => { enhanceNavArrows(); }); })();
CI/CD Results
